impact: Data trust risk across ERP surface
evidence: `placeholderData:` occurrences: 225 in 192 TSX files
fix: Introduce explicit demo mode flag and disable transactional mutations on demo data

impact: Users can act on mock data unknowingly
evidence: List pages fallback to hardcoded arrays when API empty/unavailable
reproduce: Inspect `projects/procurement/mobile` list page query fallback logic
fix: Replace fallback with explicit empty/error states and retry actions

impact: Search results may not represent backend truth
evidence: Global search uses mock result fallback
fix: Separate demo search mode and show source badge for non-backend results

impact: Unsafe destructive UX in many domains
evidence: `window.confirm(` occurrences: 31 files
fix: Replace with DS confirmation modal + object list + undo window

evidence: Bulk action label "Удалить" calls `changeStatus(CANCELLED)`
fix: Rename action to "Отменить" or implement real delete endpoint flow

evidence: Save draft handler only toast + navigate
reproduce: Click Save draft path in component
fix: Persist draft to API/local storage and recovery on reopen

impact: Mobile sync flow not implemented end-to-end
evidence: UI only calls `mobileApi.getFieldReports`; write/sync methods unused
fix: Integrate create/update/submit/sync status into UI

impact: No offline resilience for field operations
evidence: No service worker/workbox registration found
fix: Implement PWA shell + queued writes + conflict resolution UI

evidence: Hardcoded badges: 3 and 5
fix: Drive badges from query state and hide when stale/unavailable

evidence: Notification red dot rendered unconditionally
fix: Bind dot/counter to actual unread API state

impact: ARIA id collisions possible with multiple modals
evidence: `aria-labelledby` references static `modal-title` id
fix: Generate per-instance ids for title/description

evidence: Modal focuses container but no focus loop enforcement
reproduce: Inspect key handling and focus logic
fix: Add focus trap sentinels and return focus on close

impact: Icon controls may be unnamed for AT users
evidence: Icon-only buttons without explicit aria labels in topbar
fix: Add `aria-label` for icon-only actions

impact: Back button may be unclear for AT users
evidence: Back icon button lacks explicit aria label
fix: Add semantic aria labels for navigation buttons

impact: Close action unclear for screen readers
evidence: Modal close icon button has no explicit aria label
fix: Add `aria-label="Закрыть"` and keyboard hint

impact: Toolbar controls rely on tooltip/title only
evidence: Density/columns/export icon buttons lack explicit aria labels
fix: Add `aria-label` and consistent focus-visible labels

evidence: Headers lack explicit `scope` and `aria-sort` mapping
fix: Add semantic attributes and announce sort state

evidence: Raw labels used without guaranteed input id/htmlFor linkage
fix: Standardize form controls through DS FormField contract

evidence: TSX imports from `@/i18n`: 0
fix: Introduce i18n provider usage in top-traffic modules first

impact: Locale is hardcoded to one region
evidence: `Intl.NumberFormat(ru-RU)` and date-fns `ru` fixed in shared formatter
fix: Use active locale from app state/context

impact: User lands on placeholder maturity surface
evidence: Router maps `/documents` to placeholder page
fix: Replace with production documents module list

evidence: Component test files in src: 0
fix: Add component tests for DS primitives and critical pages

impact: Visual UI drift risk remains high
evidence: `toHaveScreenshot` assertions: 0
fix: Add baseline screenshot tests per critical route/viewport

evidence: Smoke tests mostly assert URL/text/visibility
fix: Add assertions for CRUD/status transitions and totals

impact: Expected behavior is outdated in tests
evidence: Test still expects unknown route redirect to `/` while app has 404 page
reproduce: Inspect navigation smoke test vs router
fix: Update test oracle to current 404 behavior

evidence: No virtualization library usage found
fix: Introduce row virtualization for high-volume pages

evidence: Client-side pagination model in generic DataTable
fix: Adopt server pagination + cursor strategy in heavy domains

impact: Chunk graph is too coarse for large app
evidence: manualChunks only vendor/charts/table/query
fix: Split by domain routes and heavy editors/charts

evidence: No saved views/presets infrastructure found on major lists
reproduce: Inspect list modules and shared DS
fix: Implement per-user saved filters/sort/column presets

evidence: No generic autosave on major transactional forms
fix: Add shared autosave + stale draft conflict UI

evidence: Sidebar has 18 groups and 146 items without role-based pruning
reproduce: Compute nav inventory from sidebar config
fix: Introduce role-based nav presets and favorites

evidence: Search only navigates to `/search?q=...`
fix: Add command palette with object actions and recents

impact: Local test run depends on host Node that may be absent
evidence: Playwright config auto-runs `npm run dev` on localhost:3000
reproduce: Inspect playwright config and host node availability
fix: Add docker-native baseURL profile and disable local webServer in container mode

impact: Build confidence is weak under current environment
evidence: Historical terminal logs show frontend build type errors during docker build
fix: Stabilize TS contracts and enforce CI gate before release

evidence: Backend probe `127.0.0.1:18080` returns connection refused
fix: Restore backend service and add health-check watchdog in compose workflow

evidence: Frontend login probe times out with 0 bytes
fix: Restart frontend container and verify response SLA

evidence: `docker ps` command timed out repeatedly
reproduce: Run docker ps with extended timeout
fix: Stabilize Docker daemon resources and restart strategy

evidence: No stable runtime to execute browser perf in this pass
fix: Treat perf numbers as pending until runtime restored

impact: High route surface raises regression probability
evidence: Route entries detected: 318
fix: Consolidate route constants and enforce route lint checks

evidence: Mixed usage of raw controls and DS wrappers across modules
fix: Add lint rule/codemod for DS form contract adoption
